name: @platform/tooling-docker
description: Container build tooling: Dockerfiles, multi-stage build patterns, and image publishing scripts.

readme.summary: Container build tooling: Dockerfiles, multi-stage build patterns, and image publishing scripts.
responsibilities: Maintain canonical Dockerfiles for each deployable application surface
Define multi-stage build patterns to minimize production image size
Provide image tagging and publishing scripts for CI integration
Enforce base image version pinning and security update cadence
nonResponsibilities: Does not own container orchestration or runtime (infra-aws)
Does not define CI pipeline stages (tooling-ci)
Does not manage container registry configuration
usage: Dockerfiles are consumed by tooling-ci to build and push images in CI
Build scripts can be run locally for development image builds
operationalNotes: Base images must be pinned to digests in production Dockerfiles
Non-root user must be configured in all production-stage images
